title: Detailed Supplier Files (01–08)
normalized_content:
Phase 0.5B – Detailed Supplier Files (01–08)
Organization: Aetheris BioPharma Private Limited
Scope: Detailed supplier dossiers for critical materials and service providers
Date: 2026-07-11
Version: R0
All supplier files below follow Aetheris numbering conventions and are consistent with
Phases 0.1–0.4, Master Index 0.5A, Core SOPs 0.5B, and other 0.5B artifacts.
Supplier File 01
Supplier ID: SUP-001
Name: ChemMolecules Ltd
Country: India
Criticality: High (API starting materials)
Owner: S. Naidu
Materials/Services Supplied:
● Key starting materials for API-101, API-102, API-103.
Qualification Status:
● Approved (since 2023).
● Last requalification: 2025-11.
Related Products:
● API-101 (Aetherol)
● API-102 (Cardexin)
● API-103 (Gluactin)
Related SOPs:
● CORP-QA-SOP-QA-0301-R0 (Supplier Qualification)
● CORP-QA-SOP-QA-0302-R0 (Supplier Audits)

1. Audit History
Audit Date Type Findings CAPA Status
2024-05-10 On-site 2 Minor (documentation SUP-001-CAPA- Closed
delays) 2024-001
2025-11-15 On-site 1 Major (change-notification SUP-001-CAPA- Closed
delay), 1 Minor 2025-002
Summary:
● 2025 Major finding: supplier failed to notify Aetheris of a process change in time.
● CAPA implemented enhanced change-notification workflow; no repeat in 2026.
2. Performance Metrics (2025–2026)
Metric 2025 2026 (YTD)
On-time delivery 94% 96%
COA accuracy 98% 99%
Complaints 1 (minor labeling) 0
3. Linked Complaints / Deviations / CAPAs
● PASH-DEV-2026-0103: Starting material released before final supplier certificate check
(linked to warehouse process, not supplier fault).
● PASH-CAPA-2026-0033: Warehouse gate implementation; supplier data used as input.

4. Quality Agreement
● Document ID: QA-SUP-001-2024-001
● Effective Date: 2024-06-01
● Key Clauses:
○ Change notification ≤ 30 days.
○ Right to audit annually.
○ COA and CoC requirements.
5. Current Status
● Status: Approved.
● Next scheduled audit: 2026-11.
● Open issues: None.
Supplier File 02
Supplier ID: SUP-002
Name: PackWorld Solutions
Country: India
Criticality: High (blister foil, cartons)
Owner: S. Naidu
Materials/Services Supplied:
● Blister foil, cartons for FPP-1001/1002/1003/1004.
Qualification Status:
● Approved (since 2022).
● Last requalification: 2025-06.
Related Products:
● FPP-1001/1002/1003/1004

1. Audit History
Audit Date Type Findings CAPA Status
2023-08-20 On-site 1 Minor (ink storage) SUP-002-CAPA- Closed
2023-001
2025-06-10 On-site No findings – Closed
2. Performance Metrics
Metric 2025 2026 (YTD)
On-time delivery 97% 98%
Artwork accuracy 99% 100%
Complaints 0 1 (under investigation, Event 02)
3. Linked Events
● Incoming Event 02: Blister seal complaint and tablet weight drift (PASH-CMP-2026-
0038, PASH-DEV-2026-0128).
● Investigation ongoing; supplier foil lot BF-77421 under review.
4. Quality Agreement
● Document ID: QA-SUP-002-2023-001
● Effective Date: 2023-09-01
● Key Clauses:

○ Artwork change control.
○ Delivery and storage conditions.
5. Current Status
● Status: Approved.
● Next audit: 2027-06.
● Open issues: Event 02 investigation.
Supplier File 03
Supplier ID: SUP-003
Name: SteriGlass International
Country: Germany
Criticality: High (glass vials, stoppers)
Owner: S. Naidu
Materials/Services Supplied:
● Glass vials, stoppers, flip-off caps for FPP-2001/2003.
Qualification Status:
● Approved (since 2022).
● Last requalification: 2025-09.
Related Products:
● FPP-2001 (Injectra 1 g)
● FPP-2003 (Vitainject 1000 mcg/mL)
1. Audit History

Audit Type Findings CAPA Status
Date
2023-03- On-site 1 Minor (warehouse temp log SUP-003-CAPA- Closed
15 gap) 2023-001
2025-09- On-site 1 Major (documentation lag in SUP-003-CAPA- Closed
20 stopper siliconization records), 2 2025-002
Minors
Summary:
● 2025 Major: delay in providing siliconization process summary for stopper lot STP-77419.
● CAPA implemented improved documentation turnaround; summary later provided as
SUPC-SUP-003-2026-002-ADD1.
2. Performance Metrics
Metric 2025 2026 (YTD)
On-time delivery 95% 97%
COA accuracy 99% 99%
Complaints 1 (particulate, 2025) 1 (crimp/residue, 2026, under
investigation)
3. Linked Complaints / Investigations
● VISK-CMP-2025-0026: Visible cosmetic particulate in Injectra vial (batch
V20012506002).
○ Investigation VISK-QA-RPT-2025-0038-R0 did not confirm supplier root cause.
● VISK-CMP-2026-0034: Loose flip-off caps and powder-like ring near stopper (batch
V20012607002).
○ Investigation VISK-QA-RPT-2026-0048-R0 ongoing; supplier components under
review.

4. Quality Agreement
● Document ID: QA-SUP-003-2023-001
● Effective Date: 2023-04-01
● Key Clauses:
○ Change notification for forming and siliconization processes.
○ Right to audit and sample testing.
5. Current Status
● Status: Approved.
● Next audit: 2027-09.
● Open issues: Ongoing complaint investigation for FPP-2001 batch V20012607002.

2. Performance Metrics
Metric 2025 2026 (YTD)
On-time delivery 93% 95%
COA accuracy 99% 100%
Complaints 0 0

Supplier File 08
Supplier ID: SUP-008
Name: PrintLabel Co
Country: India
Criticality: High (printed labels, cartons)
Owner: H. Kaur
Materials/Services Supplied:
● Printed labels, cartons, shipper labels for all FPPs.
Qualification Status:
● Approved (since 2022).
● Last requalification: 2025-08.
Related Products:
● All FPPs (1001–1004, 2001–2003)
1. Audit History
Audit Date Type Findings CAPA Status
2023-07-12 On-site 2 Minors (ink storage, SUP-008-CAPA- Closed
version control) 2023-001
2025-08-05 On-site 1 Major (label setup SUP-008-CAPA- Closed
verification gap), 1 Minor 2025-002
Summary:
● 2025 Major: misaligned label on one packaging line due to setup verification gap.
● CAPA implemented enhanced label setup checklist; no repeat in 2026.

2. Performance Metrics
Metric 2025 2026 (YTD)
On-time delivery 96% 97%
Artwork accuracy 98% 99%
Complaints 1 (label smudge, 2024) 1 (label misalignment, 2026, under
CAPA)
3. Linked Events
● VISK-CMP-2026-0019: Syringe label misalignment for Oncosup (FPP-2002).
○ Investigation VISK-QA-RPT-2026-0021-R0 and CAPA VISK-CAPA-2026-0022.
4. Quality Agreement
● Document ID: QA-SUP-008-2023-001
● Effective Date: 2023-08-01
● Key Clauses:
○ Artwork approval and version control.
○ Label setup verification requirements.
5. Current Status
● Status: Approved.
● Next audit: 2027-08.

● Open issues: CAPA VISK-CAPA-2026-0022 effectiveness monitoring ongoing.
